summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard from the hydrated preflight artifact. No security-sensitive items were detected, and no close, merge, fix, or PR-opening actions are safe or allowed for this job. The shard has no shared canonical; each listed PR is kept open or routed to the exact maintainer decision it needs.

actions.reason: Focused, apparently viable session-state fix with overlapping live alternatives; maintainers need to choose or review the canonical implementation before any closeout or merge path.
Provider capability/cache-control feature with active author follow-up and unresolved review/proof state; keep open for maintainer technical review rather than close or mutate.
Narrow memory-core bug-fix candidate remains open but proof/rebase work is outstanding; classification is related follow-up work, not a close candidate.
Narrow gateway behavior-change PR remains open with proof missing; no safe low-signal or superseded closeout under this job.
Broad config UI feature PR remains related to the live product issue #75947 but is blocked by proof and failing checks; keep open for normal maintainer/product triage.

needs_human: #91721: choose/review the canonical implementation for the diagnostic session-state ghost-entry fix among open #91721, #92188, and #93247 before any merge or superseded closeout.

#73594: maintainer technical review needed for the OpenRouter Qwen cache-control feature because the latest proof check failed and the hydrated Codex review still reports issues despite author follow-up.
